title: Prologis Announces Expansion in Chicago Logistics Market
summary: Prologis expanded its logistics portfolio in the Chicago metro area to support growing demand for industrial warehouse space.
insight: Expansion in Chicago industrial real estate market

title: Prologis Reports Strong Quarterly Business Update
summary: The company reported stable revenue growth, strong leasing activity, and continued demand across key logistics markets.

title: Prologis Completes Acquisition of Urban Logistics Assets
summary: Prologis completed the acquisition of several urban logistics assets near major population centers.

title: Prologis Invests in Sustainable Warehouse Operations
summary: The company announced investments in solar energy, efficient lighting, and sustainable warehouse infrastructure.

title: Prologis Announces New Distribution Facility in Dallas
summary: Prologis announced a new distribution facility in the Dallas region to serve retail and e-commerce customers.
